title: Procris repens

This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics, such as its leaf structure and growth habits. The family Urticaceae is a large and diverse group, containing over 2,000 species of plants. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, wounds, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
